angle: Lending Activity Pulse — track deposits, borrows, and liquidations to show protocol usage patterns, growth trajectory, and risk events
notes: First Solana indexer example. CLI init failed for SVM custom template — scaffolded manually. Uses custom transformer with d8 discriminator classification instead of full ABI decoding.
api_notes: Migrated to SDK 1.0 API names (evmPortalStream, solanaPortalStream, hyperliquidFillsPortalStream, solanaQuery, hyperliquidFillsQuery)
